steps.title: Use the consonant counts
steps.content: The sentence compares Polynesian languages with very low consonant counts to a global median of more than twenty-two consonants. Sikaiana has nine, and Olelo Hawaii has one fewer.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: B means unchanging, C means reproducible, and D describes musical quality. The data are about unusually small numbers of consonants relative to the global median, so the word must mean very low in quantity. The answer is A.
